one_time_description: Loss on write-down of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: First Nation has significant investment in business trusts and entities including ACFN Business Trust (net assets $62.8M), 2216328 Alberta Ltd (net assets $18.3M), joint ventures and partnerships. Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust and K'ai Taile Denesoline Trust hold restricted investments totalling $67.6M. Investment in Cree Chip Development Corporation at cost $2.6M (50% owned).
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Large earnings from investment in First Nation business entities ($19.8M) driven by ACFN Business Trust and 2216328 Alberta Ltd. Significant unrealized gains on restricted investments ($12.9M) and investments ($2.3M) recorded through remeasurement statement. Five GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Twelve entities/departments fully consolidated. Accumulated surplus includes $8.9M in accumulated remeasurement gains. Total_government_transfers includes ISC $1,831,693 + CMHC $294,804 + ESDC $137,800 + Province of Alberta $160,000 + Nutrition North Canada $625,381 = $3,049,678; osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers. Long-term debt note text was truncated in source document.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
